code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(prefix)
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end
